# Seeded Discussions content

When Discussions are enabled on the repo, paste each block below as a new pinned thread to give the space immediate value.

---

## 📌 Pin 1 — "Welcome — start here"

**Category:** Announcements

**Body:**

```
👋 Welcome to Multilogin Labs Discussions.

Quick links:
- 🔍 SEARCH_INDEX — 100+ keyword answers
  https://github.com/multilogin-labs/multilogin-labs/blob/main/docs/SEARCH_INDEX.md
- 🌐 Full-text search across 500+ pages
  https://multilogin-labs.github.io/multilogin-labs/search.html
- 📡 90 API endpoints + Swagger UI
  https://multilogin-labs.github.io/multilogin-labs/api/swagger.html
- ⚔️ Compare 16 antidetect tools
  https://github.com/multilogin-labs/multilogin-labs/blob/main/docs/comparisons/comparison-matrix.md
- 📊 Plan calculator
  https://multilogin-labs.github.io/multilogin-labs/calculator.html
- 🎓 Learning paths
  https://github.com/multilogin-labs/multilogin-labs/tree/main/docs/learn

Trial + partner pricing:
https://multilogin.com/pricing/?utm_source=saas&utm_medium=partner&a_aid=saas&a_bid=f5fad549
Codes: SAAS50 / MIN50

Reply with what you're building — we'll point you to the right cookbook.
```

---

## 📌 Pin 2 — "FAQ"

**Category:** Q&A

Copy `docs/faq.md` content into the body.

---

## 📌 Pin 3 — "Show & tell"

**Category:** Show and tell

**Body:**

```
Drop a screenshot or link of what you've built using this repo.

Format:
- Project: ...
- Stack: Multilogin (Mimic / cloud phone) + Playwright / Puppeteer / Selenium / Python
- One thing you learned:
- One thing you'd improve:
```

---

## 📌 Pin 4 — "Roadmap"

**Category:** Ideas

Link `ROADMAP.md`. Ask the community to upvote ideas via reactions.

---

## 📌 Pin 5 — "Comparison requests"

**Category:** Ideas

Pin to gather requests for new "Multilogin vs X" comparisons.

---

## After pinning

- Add to README a "💬 Discussions" badge.
- Cross-link from `.github/SUPPORT.md`.
